# Project Guidelines

## Repository Identity
This repository is the source for the GitHub Pages site longmax90.github.io.
Canonical remote: git@github.com:longmax90/longmax90.github.io.git.
Public site URL: https://longmax90.github.io.

## Project Purpose
The repository is dedicated to publishing blog articles on software security research.

## Editorial Focus
Primary technical domains: C, C++, and Rust.
Preferred tone and quality bar: rigorous, reproducible, and evidence-driven technical writing.

## Writing Conventions
Prioritize concrete examples, explicit assumptions, and verifiable claims.
When discussing vulnerabilities or mitigations, include threat model context and practical impact.
Avoid marketing-style language; prefer precise engineering terminology.

## Agent Behavior
Preserve the repository identity and editorial direction above in future edits.
If scaffolding blog content, keep structure simple and optimized for long-form technical posts.
